shortDescription.en: Discover inner peace through ancient meditation techniques and mindfulness practices.
shortDescription.hi: प्राचीन वैज्ञानिक ध्यान पद्धतियों और आत्म-जागरूकता द्वारा मानसिक शांति प्राप्त करें।

description: Explore various meditation traditions including Vipassana, Transcendental Meditation, and Vedantic contemplation. Learn to cultivate stillness and clarity of mind.

shortDescription.en: Train in traditional Indian martial arts including Kalaripayattu and self-defense.
shortDescription.hi: शारीरिक सुदृढ़ता और आत्मरक्षा के लिए कलरीपायट्टु एवं पारंपरिक द्वंद्व कला का अभ्यास।

description: Learn the ancient Indian martial art of Kalaripayattu along with weapons training, self-defense, and physical conditioning that builds discipline and inner strength.

shortDescription.en: Modern technology education balanced with traditional values and ethics.
shortDescription.hi: नैतिक मूल्यों, सुरक्षित उपयोग सिद्धांतों एवं कोडिंग के साथ तकनीकी शिक्षा।

description: Learn programming, digital literacy, and modern technology skills while maintaining ethical awareness and mindful use of technology.

shortDescription.en: Build confidence, communication skills, and leadership qualities.
shortDescription.hi: विद्यार्थियों में आत्मविश्वास, कुशल संवाद शैली एवं नेतृत्व गुणों का विकास।

description: Holistic personality development program focusing on public speaking, leadership, emotional intelligence, and interpersonal skills rooted in Indian wisdom.

shortDescription.en: Deep spiritual education in philosophy, rituals, and inner transformation.
shortDescription.hi: भारतीय दर्शन, संस्कृति, जीवन मूल्यों एवं चरित्र निर्माण का गूढ़ शिक्षण।

description: Advanced spiritual curriculum covering Indian philosophy, ritual practices, temple traditions, and the path to self-realization under guidance of experienced Gurus.
